SEARCH
Package io.stimulustech.filequeue

Class FileQueue.Config<T extends FileQueueItem>

java.lang.Object
io.stimulustech.filequeue.FileQueue.Config<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of FileQueueItem this configuration applies to
Enclosing class:
FileQueue<T extends FileQueueItem>
public static final class FileQueue.Config<T extends FileQueueItem> extends Object
Immutable-style configuration builder for FileQueue.

Encapsulates all options that control queue behaviour: storage path, retry policy, concurrency limits, item type, consumer, and expiration handler. Obtain an instance via FileQueue.config(String, Path, Class, Consumer, ExecutorService) and chain the setter methods before passing the result to FileQueue.startQueue(Config).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Config()
    Creates an empty configuration.
    Config(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T> type, Consumer<? super T> consumer, ExecutorService executorService)
    Creates a fully-populated configuration with the mandatory fields set.

    FileQueue.Config<T>
    maxQueueSize(int maxQueueSize)
    Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold before blocking.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    maxRetryDelay(int maxRetryDelay)
    Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    maxTries(int maxTries)
    Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    persistRetryDelay(int persistRetryDelay)
    Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit persistRetryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for persistRetryDelay(int).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    queueName(String queueName)
    Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    queuePath(Path queuePath)
    Sets the path to the queue database directory.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    retryDelay(int retryDelay)
    Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm retryDelayAlgorithm)
    Sets the retry delay algorithm.
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit retryDelayUnit)
    Sets the time unit for retryDelay(int) and maxRetryDelay(int).
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    type(Type type)
    Sets the concrete FileQueueItem subclass stored by this queue.

  • Constructor Details

    • Config

      public Config(String queueName, Path queuePath, Class<T> type, Consumer<? super T> consumer, ExecutorService executorService)
      Creates a fully-populated configuration with the mandatory fields set.
      Parameters:
      queueName - unique name for the queue
      queuePath - writable path where the queue database will be stored
      type - concrete FileQueueItem subclass to be queued
      consumer - callback invoked to process each dequeued item
      executorService - thread pool used to execute processing tasks

    • Config

      public Config()
      Creates an empty configuration. All mandatory fields must be set via the fluent setter methods before calling FileQueue.startQueue(Config).

  • Method Details

    • queuePath

      public FileQueue.Config<T> queuePath(Path queuePath)
      Sets the path to the queue database directory.
      Parameters:
      queuePath - writable path where the queue database will be stored
      Returns:
      this config

    • getQueuePath

      public Path getQueuePath()
      Returns the configured queue database path.
      Returns:
      queue database path

    • queueName

      public FileQueue.Config<T> queueName(String queueName)
      Sets a human-readable name for the queue.
      Parameters:
      queueName - unique, friendly name for the queue
      Returns:
      this config

    • getQueueName

      public String getQueueName()
      Returns the configured queue name.
      Returns:
      queue name

    • type

      public FileQueue.Config<T> type(Type type) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets the concrete FileQueueItem subclass stored by this queue.
      Parameters:
      type - subclass of FileQueueItem; must not be FileQueueItem.class itself
      Returns:
      this config
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if type is not a proper subclass of FileQueueItem

    • getType

      public Type getType()
      Returns the configured queue item type.
      Returns:
      queue item type

    • maxTries

      public FileQueue.Config<T> maxTries(int maxTries)
      Sets the maximum number of delivery attempts before an item is considered expired. Set to 0 for unlimited retries.
      Parameters:
      maxTries - maximum number of delivery attempts; 0 means unlimited
      Returns:
      this config

    • getMaxTries

      public int getMaxTries()
      Returns the maximum number of delivery attempts (0 means unlimited).
      Returns:
      maximum tries

    • retryDelay

      public FileQueue.Config<T> retryDelay(int retryDelay)
      Sets the fixed delay between delivery attempts, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit). When exponential back-off is enabled this value acts as the minimum delay.
      Parameters:
      retryDelay - delay between retries; must be >= 1
      Returns:
      this config

    • getRetryDelay

      public int getRetryDelay()
      Returns the configured retry delay.
      Returns:
      retry delay

    • persistRetryDelay

      public FileQueue.Config<T> persistRetryDelay(int persistRetryDelay)
      Sets the interval at which items persisted to disk are re-examined for reprocessing, expressed in persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit). Items are only written to disk when all in-memory consumer slots are occupied.
      Parameters:
      persistRetryDelay - polling interval for the on-disk queue; must be > 0
      Returns:
      this config

    • getPersistRetryDelay

      public int getPersistRetryDelay()
      Returns the configured persistent retry delay.
      Returns:
      persistent retry delay

    • persistRetryDelayUnit

      public FileQueue.Config<T> persistRetryDelayUnit(TimeUnit persistRetryDelayUnit)
      Sets the time unit for persistRetryDelay(int). Defaults to TimeUnit.SECONDS.
      Parameters:
      persistRetryDelayUnit - time unit for the persistent retry delay
      Returns:
      this config

    • getPersistRetryDelayUnit

      public TimeUnit getPersistRetryDelayUnit()
      Returns the configured persistent retry delay time unit.
      Returns:
      persistent retry delay time unit

    • maxRetryDelay

      public FileQueue.Config<T> maxRetryDelay(int maxRetryDelay)
      Sets the maximum delay between retries when exponential back-off is enabled, expressed in retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit). Ignored when using fixed delay.
      Parameters:
      maxRetryDelay - upper bound for exponential back-off delay
      Returns:
      this config

    • getMaxRetryDelay

      public int getMaxRetryDelay()
      Returns the configured maximum retry delay.
      Returns:
      maximum retry delay

    • retryDelayUnit

      public FileQueue.Config<T> retryDelayUnit(TimeUnit retryDelayUnit)
      Sets the time unit for retryDelay(int) and maxRetryDelay(int). Defaults to TimeUnit.SECONDS.
      Parameters:
      retryDelayUnit - time unit for retry delays
      Returns:
      this config

    • getRetryDelayUnit

      public TimeUnit getRetryDelayUnit()
      Returns the configured retry delay time unit.
      Returns:
      retry delay time unit

    • retryDelayAlgorithm

      public FileQueue.Config<T> retryDelayAlgorithm(QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm retryDelayAlgorithm)
      Sets the retry delay algorithm. Use QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm.FIXED for a constant interval between attempts, or QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm.EXPONENTIAL for exponential back-off capped at maxRetryDelay(int).
      Parameters:
      retryDelayAlgorithm - retry delay algorithm to apply
      Returns:
      this config

    • getRetryDelayAlgorithm

      public QueueProcessor.RetryDelayAlgorithm getRetryDelayAlgorithm()
      Returns the configured retry delay algorithm.
      Returns:
      retry delay algorithm

    • consumer

      public FileQueue.Config<T> consumer(Consumer<? super T> consumer)
      Sets the consumer callback that processes items dequeued from the queue.
      Parameters:
      consumer - consumer to invoke for each queue item
      Returns:
      this config

    • getConsumer

      public Consumer<? super T> getConsumer()
      Returns the configured consumer callback.
      Returns:
      consumer callback

    • expiration

      public FileQueue.Config<T> expiration(Expiration<T> expiration)
      Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts. If not set, expired items are silently discarded.
      Parameters:
      expiration - handler called with each expired queue item
      Returns:
      this config

    • getExpiration

      public Expiration<T> getExpiration()
      Returns the configured expiration handler.
      Returns:
      expiration handler, or null if not set

    • maxQueueSize

      public FileQueue.Config<T> maxQueueSize(int maxQueueSize)
      Sets the maximum number of items the queue will hold before blocking. Defaults to Integer.MAX_VALUE (effectively unbounded).
      Parameters:
      maxQueueSize - maximum number of concurrently queued items; must be > 0
      Returns:
      this config

    • getMaxQueueSize

      public int getMaxQueueSize()
      Returns the configured maximum queue size.
      Returns:
      maximum queue size
